prompt:
Goal: Create an ornate vertical Chinese historical-romance poster / character infographic featuring Shi Xiangyun as a full-body young noblewoman in a spring garden, blending cinematic photorealism with delicate illustrated UI overlays.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, warm parchment-and-gold palette, soft morning sunlight, shallow depth of field, high detail. Background is a blooming classical Chinese courtyard garden with pavilions, stone path, flowering trees, peonies, drifting pink petals, and a dreamy misty atmosphere.

Main subject: Centered full-body Hanfu woman standing on a round carved stone platform. She wears a flowing pastel embroidered Hanfu in pale blue, blush pink, ivory, and soft teal, layered translucent sleeves and long ribbons moving in the breeze, floral embroidery, pink sash belt, tassel ornaments, embroidered shoes, and ornate traditional hair buns decorated with small flowers and hairpins. Her right arm reaches toward the viewer holding a small green floral porcelain wine cup; her left hand holds a bouquet of large pink peonies. Use a graceful, poised, friendly gesture, with the face softly obscured or left non-specific.

Left title column: Add a textured parchment vertical strip on the left. Large black brush-calligraphy title reads 「史湘云」. Smaller vertical subtitle reads 「红楼梦·枕霞旧友」. Add a small red seal stamp. Below are exactly 3 stacked rectangular navigation tabs labeled: 1) 「明朗豪爽」 2) 「醉卧芍药」 3) 「少年清气」.

Information cards: Surround the subject with exactly 8 vintage parchment story cards connected by thin gold geometric lines, small circular number badges, translucent crystal-like paper shards, and faint constellation nodes. Each card has a sepia miniature illustration and Chinese title/body text. Use these exact numbered titles:
01 「史府旧影 湘云初至」
02 「大观园中 掌声成趣」
03 「海棠诗社 才思明快」
04 「芦雪庵联 豪气纵笔」
05 「醉卧芍药 春梦花眠」
06 「金麒麟缘 命运微响」
07 「枕霞旧友 笑语如风」
08 「云散高唐 明朗余音」
Place cards 01, 02, 03, 04 down the left/left-lower side and cards 05, 06, 07, 08 down the right side. Keep the card text small, decorative, and secondary; prioritize the titles and the numbered badges.

Bottom elements: At the base of the platform, add a gold plaque with the quote 一盏春酒，满身花气. Along the very bottom edge, add a thin gold timeline with exactly 5 labeled nodes: 「初至」, 「诗社」, 「联句」, 「醉卧」, 「余音」.

Visual style: Elegant Chinese vintage editorial design, Red Chamber Dream aesthetic, parchment texture, gold filigree borders, ink brush typography, sepia story thumbnails, translucent collage fragments, romantic peony blossoms, soft bokeh, premium museum-poster composition, highly detailed fabric and embroidery, cinematic lighting.

Constraints: Keep all text in Chinese exactly where specified, use no English text inside the image, no watermark, no logo, no extra cards, no extra timeline nodes, no modern objects.
